# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

cors:
  _config:
    name: cors
  global:
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
        - "https://example.com"
        - "https://another-example.com"
      methods:
        - "GET"
        - "POST"
        - "OPTIONS"
      headers:
        - "Content-Type"
        - "Authorization"
      expose_headers:
        - "Custom-Header"
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
  service:
    my_service:
      enabled: true
      config:
        origins:
          - "https://service-example.com"
        methods:
          - "GET"
        headers:
          - "Content-Type"
  route:
    my_route:
      enabled: true
      config:
        origins:
          - "https://route-example.com"

authentication:
  _config:
    name: key-auth
  global:
    enabled: true
    config:
      key_names:
        - "api_key"
  service:
    my_service:
      enabled: true
      config:
        key_names:
          - "service_api_key"
  route:
    my_route:
      enabled: true
      config:
        key_names:
          - "route_api_key"

rate_limiting:
  _config:
    name: rate-limiting
  global:
    enabled: true
    config:
      minute: 100
      hour: 1000
  service:
    my_service:
      enabled: true
      config:
        minute: 50
  route:
    my_route:
      enabled: true
      config:
        minute: 20
